impact: Provides deterministic fixture coverage for lifecycle missing-information detection before any implementation, live crawl, DevHub login, or official action automation is added.
summary: Adds the lifecycle missing-information expected-output fixture with one redacted record per accepted lifecycle category.
target_task: Task checkbox-28: Add a fixture-only lifecycle missing-information expected-output fixture at `ppd/tests/fixtures/lifecycle/permit_lifecycle_missing_information_expected_output.json` with exactly one redacted missing-information record for each accepted lifecycle category, source-backed to the lifecycle process skeleton fixtures, deduplicated by `(categoryId, neededItemId)`, and classified as read-only, draft-preview, consequential-stop, or financial-stop.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
